ruleset.name: Code Size Rules
ruleset.description: The Code Size Ruleset contains a collection of rules that find code size related problems.

rule.name: CyclomaticComplexity
rule.message: The {0} {1}() has a Cyclomatic Complexity of {2}. The configured cyclomatic complexity threshold is {3}.
rule.description: Complexity is determined by the number of decision points in a method plus one for the method entry. The decision points are 'if', 'while', 'for', 'foreach', 'catch', 'case labels', '&&', '||', '??', and ternary '?:'. Generally, 1-4 is low complexity, 5-7 indicates moderate complexity, 8-10 is high complexity, and 11+ is very high complexity.

property.name: showClassesComplexity
property.description: Indicate if class average violation should be added to the report

property.name: showMethodsComplexity
property.description: Indicate if class average violation should be added to the report
